commands.name: list
commands.description: List available serial ports

commands.name: monitor
commands.description: Serial monitor for the device

commands.name: live
commands.description: Show a live dashboard for the device

commands.name: info
commands.description: Dump info about the device

commands.name: get
commands.description: Display one or more settings from the device

commands.name: set
commands.description: Save one or more settings onto the device

commands.name: channel
commands.description: Enable, Disable, Add, Save channels on the device

commands.name: url
commands.description: Get or set shared channel url

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The channel url to set on the device

commands.name: reboot
commands.description: Reboot the device

commands.name: register
commands.description: Print registration info for the device

commands.name: metadata
commands.description: Get device metadata from the device

commands.name: factory-reset
commands.description: Factory reset configuration of the device

commands.name: fixed-position
commands.description: Set the device to a fixed position

commands.name: text
commands.description: Send a text message from the device

commands.name: remove-node
commands.description: Remove single node by nodenum from node db of the device

arguments.name: nodenum
arguments.description: Nodenum of the node to remove from the device NodeDB

commands.name: reset-nodedb
commands.description: Reset the node db of the device

commands.name: trace-route
commands.description: Trace the sequence of nodes routing to the destination

commands.name: canned-messages
commands.description: Get or set the collection of canned messages on the device

arguments.name: operation
arguments.description: Get or set canned messages [default: Get]

commands.name: waypoint
commands.description: Send a waypoint from the device

commands.name: file
commands.description: Get or send a file from the device

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update the firmware of the serial connected device

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export the profile of the connected device as yaml

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import the profile export from a yaml file and set the connected device

commands.name: mqtt-proxy
commands.description: Proxy to the MQTT server referenced in the MQTT module config of the connected device

commands.name: request-telemetry
commands.description: Request a telemetry packet from a repeater by nodenum

commands.name: dfu
commands.description: Enter (Uf2) DFU mode on NRF52 devices

commands.name: input-event
commands.description: Send an input event to the device
